==Pokémon==
[[File:Mallow and her Pokémon.png|thumb|250px|Mallow with Tsareena and Shaymin]]
Like {{an|Cilan}}, Mallow mostly specialized in {{type|Grass}} Pokémon. Mallow also has her Pokémon help in her cooking and at her families restaurant. Her {{TP|Mallow|Tsareena}} is both her only and strongest Pokémon. However, Mallow took the [[Mythical Pokémon]] {{TP|Mallow|Shaymin}} under her care and became her second Pokémon until it changed into its Sky Forme and fly away. Although she has shown to have skills in Pokémon battles, Mallow doesn't have a lot of experience like most of her classmates do.

This listing is of Mallow's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
